ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "aus_us_size" INTEGER /* Size in AUS/US standard */,
  "europe_size" TEXT /* Size in Europe standard */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in UK standard */,
  "brazil_size" TEXT /* Size in Brazil standard */,
  "foot_length_mm" TEXT /* Foot length range in millimeters for the size */,
  "conversion_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the conversion (e.g., AUS/US to Europe) */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., Footwear, Socks) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the conversion data was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_brazil_size FOREIGN KEY ("brazil_size") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_europe_size FOREIGN KEY ("europe_size") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_uk_size FOREIGN KEY ("uk_size") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_aus_us_size FOREIGN KEY ("aus_us_size") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard used in the region (e.g., AUS/US, Europe, UK, Brazil) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foot_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foot measurement entry */,
  "foot_length_mm" REAL /* Foot length in millimeters */,
  "heel_to_ball_length_mm" REAL /* Heel to ball length in millimeters */,
  "heel_to_toe_length_mm" REAL /* Heel to toe length in millimeters */,
  "heel_circumference_mm" REAL /* Heel circumference in millimeters */,
  "ball_circumference_mm" REAL /* Ball circumference in millimeters */,
  "toe_circumference_mm" REAL /* Toe circumference in millimeters */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person measured */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids') */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product information was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product in the region's standard */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Stock status (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion log entry */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion entry used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the conversion */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was performed */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., AUS/US to Europe) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the conversion */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Web, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user performing the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, data analyst, customer support) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., size_conversion, foot_measurements) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Web, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES foot_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart view entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the size chart */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was viewed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user viewing the chart */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Web, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user viewing the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_views_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user providing feedback */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Web, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user providing feedback */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of any images provided with the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
